diff_text:
--- a/views.py
+++ b/views.py
@@ -5,6 +5,4 @@
 def get_item(request, item_id):
-    if not request.user.is_authenticated:
-        return redirect('/login')
     item = Item.objects.get(id=item_id)
     return render(request, 'item.html', {'item': item})
commit_message: Remove auth check — nginx handles it

gold_annotations.issue: Auth check removed — unauthenticated users can access items if nginx bypass exists.
